summary: R2 fixes address systems_architect REQUEST_CHANGES by replacing generic M4 save unknown[] copying with explicit nested M4 save DTOs, parsers, and copy functions that rebuild only known fields; adding malformed/extra nested M4 save coverage; and replacing the direct same-source M5 worker-compatible adapter with a real Node Worker JSON message boundary inside allowed apps/sim-runner/test paths.

tests_run.result: R2 implementation touched allowed paths only: apps/sim-runner, packages/save-format, tests, and allowed project task/state/message files.
23 test files passed; 172 tests passed. Includes M5 worker message-boundary test and M4 malformed/extra save coverage through save-load-contract.
Hello, command/query, save/load, M4 replay, and M5 playable loop hashes matched. M5 Node hash bf042e42; M5 worker-compatible hash bf042e42; loaded hash bf042e42.
Architecture boundaries passed; determinism passed; root vitest 34 files/244 tests passed; web vitest 1 file/4 tests passed.
ERR_PNPM_RECURSIVE_RUN_NO_SCRIPT: selected package still has no typecheck script.

decisions: Chose save-format boundary stripping/rejection rather than preserving unknown nested M4 keys: imported M4 save data is reconstructed from explicit known fields only, and tampered raw bodies with unknown extra keys no longer pass checksum validation after parser canonicalization.

Added explicit nested M4 save DTO/parser/copy coverage for campaign plans, faction knowledge snapshots, mobilized force commitments, grain supply reservations, marches, field engagements, sieges, withdrawals, war outcomes, postwar candidates, and their nested union/object fields.

Kept M5 gameplay intent unchanged: accepted M4 replay plus M3 tribute-only postwar governance, duplicate-settlement failure branch, no UI/client/content/manual battle/server/telemetry/multiplayer/mod scope.

Implemented real worker-compatible M5 evidence through apps/sim-runner/src/m5-playable-loop-worker.mjs using JSON request/response over Node worker_threads; apps/web remains untouched because it is forbidden.

risks.summary: M4 save-format schema is now explicit but large; systems_architect should review field coverage against accepted M4 runtime state before QA routing.
The M5 worker-compatible path is a Node Worker message boundary, not the forbidden apps/web worker. It exercises serialization/message crossing without UI/client path changes.

requested_action: Review R2 fixes for explicit nested M4 save schema boundary, hidden-field rejection/stripping coverage, and real M5 worker-compatible message-boundary coverage. If accepted, route onward to qa_reviewer.
